text: I'd like you to {{c1::take the lead on}} this integration, but feel free to escalate if you hit any roadblocks.
explanation: take the lead on means to assume responsibility for directing or managing a specific project. escalate means to report a problem up the chain of command when tools or resources are blocked.
usage:
Patterns: take the lead on [project/task] | escalate to [someone]
  • She will take the lead on the customer migration.
  • If the vendor does not respond, escalate the ticket to me.
spanish: Me gustaría que lideres esta integración, pero no dudes en escalar si te encuentras con algún obstáculo.

text: It is my responsibility to delegate tasks and ensure my team has the support they need to {{c1::meet their targets}}.
explanation: To 'meet targets' means to achieve the specific goals, performance levels, or metrics set by company leadership.
usage:
Pattern: meet targets / achieve goals
  • The sales team worked hard to meet their targets this quarter.
  • We did not meet our performance targets last year.
spanish: Es mi responsabilidad delegar tareas y asegurar que mi equipo tenga el apoyo que necesita para cumplir con sus metas/objetivos.

text: We need to hold weekly one-on-one meetings to check in on progress and remove any {{c1::blockers}}.
explanation: A 'blocker' (or impediment) is an issue, bug, or dependency that prevents a team member from making progress on their tasks.
usage:
Pattern: remove blockers / clear roadblocks
  • My primary job as a manager is to remove blockers for my devs.
  • Do you have any blockers keeping you from finishing the script?
spanish: Necesitamos realizar reuniones individuales semanales para revisar el progreso y eliminar cualquier bloqueador/impedimento.

text: My goal is to support my team's professional development and help them {{c1::reach their full potential}}.
explanation: To 'reach your full potential' means to develop your talents, skills, and career capabilities to the maximum possible level.
usage:
Pattern: reach full potential / unlock potential
  • A good leader helps their employees reach their full potential.
  • Mentorship is key to helping junior devs reach their full potential.
spanish: Mi objetivo es apoyar el desarrollo profesional de mi equipo y ayudarles a alcanzar su máximo potencial.

text: We must manage our team's workload carefully to prevent burnout and maintain high {{c1::morale}}.
explanation: 'Morale' refers to the enthusiasm, confidence, and mental state of a group or team regarding their tasks and work environment.
usage:
Pattern: boost morale / low morale
  • Missing targets led to low morale in the sales department.
  • The team-building event was organized to boost morale.
spanish: Debemos gestionar el volumen de trabajo de nuestro equipo cuidadosamente para evitar el agotamiento y mantener la moral alta.

text: I need to coordinate with other department heads to align our resource allocation and {{c1::avoid duplication of effort}}.
explanation: To 'avoid duplication of effort' means to organize work so that two different people or teams do not spend resources doing the exact same task independently.
usage:
Pattern: avoid duplication of effort / streamline work
  • We merged the codebases to avoid duplication of effort.
  • Communication is essential to avoid duplication of effort in large projects.
spanish: Necesito coordinar con otros jefes de departamento para alinear nuestra asignación de recursos y evitar la duplicación de esfuerzos.

text: We will recognize outstanding performance by offering bonuses and public {{c1::praise}}.
explanation: 'Praise' refers to expressions of approval, commendation, or admiration. Offering 'public praise' honors someone's achievements in front of their peers.
usage:
Pattern: public praise / praise employees
  • Praise in public and criticize in private.
  • The CEO offered public praise to the migration team.
spanish: Reconoceremos el rendimiento sobresaliente ofreciendo bonos y elogios/reconocimiento público.

text: I need to review our team's performance data and present the findings to senior {{c1::stakeholders}}.
explanation: A 'stakeholder' is anyone who has an interest or investment in a business or project. 'Senior stakeholders' typically refer to directors, executives, or clients.
usage:
Pattern: senior stakeholders / key stakeholders
  • We must keep our senior stakeholders informed of project delays.
  • The requirements were defined by the key stakeholders.
spanish: Necesito revisar los datos de rendimiento de nuestro equipo y presentar los hallazgos a las partes interesadas/directivos sénior.

text: We must establish clear performance guidelines so everyone knows what is {{c1::expected of them}}.
explanation: What is 'expected of someone' refers to the tasks, behaviors, or results they are responsible for delivering in their role.
usage:
Pattern: expected of [someone] / job expectations
  • You did not meet what was expected of you this month.
  • Clear communication helps everyone understand what is expected of them.
spanish: Debemos establecer pautas de rendimiento claras para que todos sepan qué es esperado de ellos.

text: I am here to support you; please let me know if you need to {{c1::escalate}} any issues.
explanation: To 'escalate' an issue means to refer a problem or task to a higher authority or senior manager because it cannot be resolved at the current level.
usage:
Pattern: escalate issues / escalate a ticket
  • If the client is still unhappy, escalate the call to me.
  • We had to escalate the database outage to the operations director.
spanish: Estoy aquí para apoyarle; por favor hágame saber si necesita escalar/elevar a un nivel superior cualquier problema.

text: It is my goal to ensure my team members have a healthy work-life balance and feel {{c1::valued}}.
explanation: To feel 'valued' means feeling that your contributions, ideas, and presence are recognized, appreciated, and respected by managers.
usage:
Pattern: feel valued / appreciated employee
  • Praising employees in public helps them feel valued.
  • If workers don't feel valued, they will leave the company.
spanish: Mi meta es asegurar que los miembros de mi equipo tengan un equilibrio saludable entre el trabajo y la vida personal y se sientan valorados.

text: We need to set up performance reviews next month to discuss career goals and identify areas for {{c1::growth}}.
explanation: 'Career growth' (or professional growth) refers to climbing the corporate ladder, learning new skills, and taking on more responsibility.
usage:
Pattern: career growth / professional development
  • This role offers excellent opportunities for career growth.
  • Mentorship is essential for employee career growth.
spanish: Necesitamos programar evaluaciones de desempeño el próximo mes para discutir las metas profesionales e identificar áreas de crecimiento.

text: My responsibility is to manage the project budget and ensure we do not exceed our allocated {{c1::spending limits}}.
explanation: A 'spending limit' is a strict maximum amount of money allocated for a specific project, department, or transaction.
usage:
Pattern: spending limits / budget constraints
  • The director set strict spending limits on travel.
  • We must monitor expenses to stay within our spending limits.
spanish: Mi responsabilidad es gestionar el presupuesto del proyecto y asegurar que no excedamos nuestros límites de gasto asignados.

text: We must foster a culture of open communication where feedback is shared constructively and {{c1::respectfully}}.
explanation: 'Respectfully' is an adverb meaning in a way that shows honor, politeness, and consideration for other people's feelings and opinions.
usage:
Pattern: respectfully disagree / treat others respectfully
  • You can respectfully disagree with your manager during meetings.
  • Please treat all team members respectfully.
spanish: Debemos fomentar una cultura de comunicación abierta donde la retroalimentación se comparta de manera constructiva y respetuosa.

text: I need to coordinate with the recruitment team to hire additional developers for our new product {{c1::line}}.
explanation: A 'product line' is a group of related products manufactured or distributed by a single company.
usage:
Pattern: product line / launch a product line
  • We are expanding our product line to target enterprise users.
  • He is the director for our software product line.
spanish: Necesito coordinar con el equipo de reclutamiento para contratar desarrolladores adicionales para nuestra nueva línea de productos.

text: We will hold a team retro meeting next Friday to discuss what went well and what we can {{c1::improve}}.
explanation: To 'improve' is the verb meaning to make or become better, a core goal in Agile retrospective (retro) meetings.
usage:
Pattern: continuous improvement / improve code quality
  • We met to discuss how we can improve our deployment workflow.
  • Automation helps improve efficiency.
spanish: Realizaremos una reunión retrospectiva de equipo el próximo viernes para discutir qué salió bien y qué podemos mejorar.

text: I need to review our team's project deliverables and ensure they meet our quality {{c1::assurance standards}}.
explanation: 'Quality assurance standards' (QA standards) are the system of checks and criteria used to verify that software or products are bug-free and meet specifications.
usage:
Pattern: quality assurance standards / QA guidelines
  • All releases must comply with our quality assurance standards.
  • The code was rejected because it failed quality assurance standards.
spanish: Necesito revisar los entregables del proyecto de nuestro equipo y asegurar que cumplan con nuestros estándares de control de calidad.

text: We must set clear boundaries regarding working hours to prevent burnout among our remote {{c1::workers}}.
explanation: A 'remote worker' (or telecommuter) is an employee who works from home or another location outside the physical company office.
usage:
Pattern: remote workers / hybrid work model
  • Managing remote workers requires clear communication channels.
  • Many remote workers appreciate the flexible schedule.
spanish: Debemos establecer límites claros con respecto a las horas de trabajo para evitar el agotamiento entre nuestros trabajadores remotos.

text: I am here to help you succeed; please do not hesitate to reach out if you need any resources or {{c1::guidance}}.
explanation: 'Guidance' refers to advice, direction, or instruction provided by a senior manager or mentor to help a person resolve tasks or grow.
usage:
Pattern: seek guidance / offer guidance
  • Junior developers seek guidance from tech leads.
  • I appreciate your guidance during the code refactoring.
spanish: Estoy aquí para ayudarle a tener éxito; por favor, no dude en comunicarse si necesita algún recurso u orientación.

text: We need to align our technical roadmap with the product manager's business objectives for the upcoming {{c1::year}}.
explanation: An 'upcoming year' (or fiscal year) is the subsequent calendar or financial period for which goals and budgets are planned.
usage:
Pattern: upcoming year / upcoming quarter
  • What are the company goals for the upcoming year?
  • We planned our budget for the upcoming year.
spanish: Necesitamos alinear nuestra hoja de ruta técnica con los objetivos comerciales del gerente de producto para el próximo año.
